title: Pharmatea Experimental Protocol for Summer 2019 trial
author: Hunter, William Ross
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by
description: This document provides an detailed experimental protocol for the PharmaTea Experiment conducted in Northern Ireland and Sweden in August and September 2019. The method integrates the Tea-Bag Index, a low-cost method of quantifying microbial activity in soils by measuring the decay rates of green and rooibos tea as proxies for labile and recalcitrant organic matter, into a series of contaminant exposure experiments to assess microbial sensitivity to pharmaceuticals in aquatic ecosystems.
steps_raw: This document provides an detailed experimental protocol for the PharmaTea Experiment conducted in Northern Ireland and Sweden in August and September 2019. The method integrates the Tea-Bag Index, a low-cost method of quantifying microbial activity in soils by measuring the decay rates of green and rooibos tea as proxies for labile and recalcitrant organic matter, into a series of contaminant exposure experiments to assess microbial sensitivity to pharmaceuticals in aquatic ecosystems.
